creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As Heikki Suonsivu wrote:

> 2.2 RELENG supped 6th jan 1997, ASUS T2P4, 128M, lots of disks (news
> server).  pcvt. The keyboard is no-name bulk keyboard. 

> The system sometimes locks on early on boot, right after copyright
> messages.

That's basically a known bug, although the fix is still unknown.  I
tried various things (although not yet Bruce's most recent
suggestion).

I simply didn't file a PR for just myself by now. ;-)

Btw., it would have been more useful to put `pcvt' into the
synopsis...

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
